profile: The candidate is an experienced Electrical Project Manager based in Amsterdam, Netherlands with 8+ years of relevant experience. Experience spans data centre, fit-out, and commissioning environments. Recent project exposure includes Leads brownfield upgrade and commissioning workstreams for live data centre campuses in the Netherlands. Key strengths include Commissioning coordination, Supplier management, Brownfield delivery, and Electrical project delivery. Qualifications include HNC Electrical Engineering and SMSTS.
relevantProjects: Leads brownfield upgrade and commissioning workstreams for live data centre campuses in the Netherlands.
